summary: Good‑quality audience tape of a solid show, highlighted by a jazzy Dark Star on an excellent second set.
review: The recording is an unrecognized audience tape that remains very listenable and clear enough for enjoyment. Musically the concert shines in its second set, especially a jazzy Dark Star, while the first set feels sluggish with a flubbed Friend of the Devil and slower Jerry Garcia playing. Overall it’s a damned good show despite its early‑set rough edges.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one detailed review; shows strong second‑set performance (≈3.5) and decent audience recording quality (≈4). Weighted average yields ~3.6 stars.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Described as very listenable and good‑quality for an unrecognized audience tape; no major flaws noted.

show_quality.setlist_flow: First set feels slow and tentative, especially Jerry's playing, while the second set picks up with strong momentum and a jazzy Dark Star.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Appears in a very slow, opiatic mood; flubs high‑speed solo on Friend of the Devil but uses negative space nicely on Bird Song.
